## Summary

A short description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem it Solves

What pain point or gap does this address? What are you currently unable to do?

## Proposed Solution

How you imagine it working — UI, behaviour, where it fits in the app.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about, or workarounds you're currently using.

## Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, EVE mechanic context, or anything else that helps explain the request -->
